name: GitLab source (example)
author: Symphony
description: Issue-source plugin for GitLab: pulls open issues across the configured projects as Symphony tasks, and pushes terminal task status back by adding a note and closing the issue. Reads its token + projects from <install-dir>/config.json. Repackages the in-tree GitLab connector via the @symphony/plugin-sdk provides.issueSource contract — fetch_open_issues + write_back_status, wrapped host-side into the same ingest + writeback pipeline (sync_gitlab).
